title: SRK flushed before propagating error from wolfTPM2_GetKeyTemplate_ECC — correct
description: EccKey::create flushes the SRK transient slot before propagating any error out of wolfTPM2_GetKeyTemplate_ECC or wolfTPM2_CreateAndLoadKey. The refactored map_err idiom preserves this guarantee in fewer lines. A future contributor might refactor the error handling and accidentally drop the srk flush on the error path — that would leak a TPM transient slot, causing eventual TPM_RC_OBJECT_MEMORY failures. The flush must remain on all error paths before returning from create().
